personalInfo.name: Attachaipengpit
personalInfo.about: I am a highly motivated Senior Full Stack Developer with a passion for designing, developing, and architecting robust web applications. I thrive in environments where I can tackle complex problems, lead technical initiatives, and mentor team members.

experience.description: Led the development of scalable microservices, mentored junior developers, and improved system performance by 40%.
Developed and maintained multiple React applications, integrated with RESTful APIs, and set up CI/CD pipelines.

projects.title: E-Commerce Microservices Platform
projects.description: A scalable e-commerce platform built with microservices architecture, featuring real-time inventory management and payment gateway integration.

projects.title: AI Task Manager
projects.description: An intelligent task management application that uses AI to prioritize daily tasks and predict project completion timelines.

projects.title: Real-time Collaboration Tool
projects.description: A web-based whiteboard for teams to collaborate in real-time, featuring WebSockets and Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs).
